title: SpaceX stocks plunge 16% and lose most of their debut gains
summary: Elon Musk's company suffers a sharp stock market drop amid concerns over its debt and business slowdown.

title: United States and Iran make progress in nuclear talks, easing tensions in the Gulf
summary: The parties reach preliminary agreements and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz is expected, boosting Asian markets.

title: Quantum stocks surge after Trump's executive orders to boost technology
summary: The US president signs decrees to promote quantum computing, benefiting companies in the sector.

title: Fatal Tesla accident in Texas under federal investigation
summary: US authorities open an investigation after a company vehicle crashed into a home.

title: Lynas Rare Earths drops on stock market due to Chinese restrictions on rare earth exports
summary: China limits trade with US rare earth companies, affecting Lynas and the global sector.

title: Oil falls amid progress in US-Iran negotiations
summary: Crude oil prices plummet as the roadmap for a final agreement and the possible reopening of the Strait of Hormuz are revealed.

title: Uncontrolled spending on artificial intelligence worries tech investors
summary: Big tech leaders are willing to spend huge amounts on AI, which is starting to scare the market.

title: Two key AI researchers leave Alphabet, stock falls 6%
summary: The brain drain to OpenAI and Anthropic hits Google and reflects the growing competition for artificial intelligence experts.

title: Apollo restricts redemptions from its flagship private credit fund
summary: The $26 billion fund imposes a 5% limit on withdrawal requests amid a flood of applications.

title: SK Hynix surpasses Samsung to become the most valuable company in South Korea
summary: Driven by demand for AI memory, the company reaches the top spot by market capitalization after 25 years.

title: Alan Greenspan, former US Federal Reserve Chairman, dies
summary: Greenspan, who led the Fed for almost two decades and was considered an economic oracle, dies at age 99.

title: Wall Street ends mixed with Dow Jones slightly up and sharp drop in SpaceX
summary: The Dow Jones rises 0.3% while the Nasdaq falls more than 1%, weighed down by SpaceX's plunge and tech pressure.

title: British prime minister resigns, new leader expected by July
summary: Starmer's resignation triggers market unease over fiscal deterioration, as succession in the ruling party accelerates.

title: Ibex 35 nears record highs and doubles the performance of the British stock market
summary: The Spanish index is boosted by banking strength and investor confidence, outperforming other European markets.

title: US stock futures fall pressured by tech sector
summary: Losses from Alphabet and SpaceX drag down futures, reflecting skepticism about big tech valuations.

title: Several companies prepare for US IPOs amid mixed market
summary: Gores Holdings, Ambitious Entertainment, and Miner Sinda move forward with their IPO plans, while investor appetite remains selective.

title: Artificial intelligence emerges as the next major hurdle for workers
summary: Experts warn that AI could displace jobs massively, sparking debate about the future of the labor market.

title: Meta pauses its eye-tracking system and appoints new head of WhatsApp
summary: Facebook's parent company halts monitoring technology due to security concerns and reshuffles its executive team.

title: Best CD rates of the day reach up to 4% APY
summary: Banks offer competitive yields on certificates of deposit, savings accounts, and money market accounts in the US.

title: EasyJet rejects Castlelake's £4.7 billion takeover offer
summary: The low-cost airline believes the proposal undervalues the company and bets on its independent growth plan.
